title: Coinverse Gearcoins (Create Economy)
body:
![Coinverse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43dc17e32b30561daac96d198b0b5aed360a51b3.webp)
!
[Bisecthosting 25% off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc9f04e7c9a5e02473f8b4c0d33a59ccf66bb48.webp)
[25% off here](https://bisecthosting.com/theminemat)


A Mod that ads Coins/Economy for SMP servers

This mod is for Smp servers. The players can't craft coins, its only avaliable in the creative Inventory. Players can trade and craft them into larger units.

Players cannot get coins on their own, they are only available in the Creative Inventory to regulate the Amount of money on servers.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0259f8cf418348abd791dbe3b0ac01b2c8a85ac8.webp)
There are 3 different coins that can be convertet into each other in a crafting table.

Bronzecoin (worth 1)

Silvercoin (worth 9)

Goldcoin (worth 36)

![Faq](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28de0ff7724383df775bea7000db852971692bc3.webp)
**Q: Can I use this in my Modpack?**

**A:** Of course you can!

**Q: How can I use this on my Server?**

**A:** Just upload the mod to the server (tutorials how to install mods on servers are on YouTube) and install it on you client.
